text:
"@RBLBankCares, RBL is currently transitioning into a foreign lender with Emirates NBD, yet your customer service feels like a local grocery shop. 📉🤡

You are sending editable Excel sheets as 'Audit Proof' for a 431-day delay? This is a massive embarrassment for a scheduled commercial bank.

1️⃣ Is this the standard of 'Digital Banking' you are presenting to your new international promoters? 2️⃣ Why are you hiding behind spreadsheets that anyone can modify instead of providing an Authorized Outward Remittance Report?
It’s time for some Professionalism & Transparency. 🏦🔍

I’ve informed the RBI Ombudsman that RBL prefers Excel over official banking records.

@RBI @CNBCAwaaz #RBLBank #BankingEthics #AmateurHour #AuditFailure"

text:
BREAKING: Standard Chartered is exploring a full takeover of Zodia Custody, the digital asset custodian it co-founded with Northern Trust.

The bank wants to shift from co-investor to sole operator of institutional crypto custody infrastructure.

Here's what this means 🧵 https://t.co/fueKLqH1YR
html:
For the deal to close, Standard Chartered needs agreement from minority shareholders: Northern Trust, Emirates NBD, National Australia Bank, and SBI Holdings.

Four major global financial institutions all sitting at the table. This is a heavyweight negotiation.

علم الإمارات رمز القوة والفخر  .. ندعو أبناء الإمارات والمقيمين على أرضها الطيبة أن يرفعوه فوق المنازل والمؤسسات والمباني.. 

فخورين بدولتنا .. فخورين برئيس دولتنا ..فخورين بقواتنا المسلحة .. فخورين بقوة اقتصادنا .. فخورين بفرق عملنا .. فخورين بجميع مواطنينا والمقيمين على أرضنا .. فخورين بعلمنا 🇦🇪.. 

لنرفع العلم شامخاً فوق كل بيت ومبنى .. دليل محبتنا .. ورمز ولائنا لرئيس دولتنا.. وراية وحدتنا وتوحدنا .. 

حفظ الله الإمارات وشعبها وأدام بالعز رايتها ومجدها ..

The United Arab Emirates entered the recent crisis united and emerged from it even more united, cohesive, and loyal—citizens and residents, young and old, military and civilian, government and economic sectors—everyone united under the banner of the state, its flag, and the symbol of its unity.

The flag of the UAE is a symbol of strength and pride. We call upon the people of the UAE and residents on its blessed land to raise it above homes, institutions, and buildings.

Proud of our country, proud of our President, proud of our armed forces, proud of the strength of our economy, proud of our teams, proud of all our citizens and residents on our land, proud of our flag 🇦🇪.

Let us raise the flag high above every home and building, a testament to our love and a symbol of our loyalty to our President and the banner of our unity and togetherness.

May God protect the UAE and its people and keep its flag and glory high. 

#Proud_of_the_UAE 🇦🇪

text:
بمناسبة ساعة الأرض، نؤمن أن حماية كوكبنا تبدأ من كل واحد فينا.
في بنك الإمارات دبي الوطني، الاستدامة ليست مجرد التزام، بل هي أفعال نقوم بها كل يوم.

من إطلاق أول تقارير للبصمة الكربونية والانبعاثات الممولة، لافتتاح أول فرع حاصل على شهادة LEED الذهبية، نواصل التقدم بهدف واضح. ومن خلال مبادرات مثل أبطال التمويل المستدام، واعتمادنا على طاقة متجددة لتغطية 94% من استهلاكنا، مما يسرّع التحول نحو مستقبل أكثر استدامة، ويدعم رؤية مصر 2030.

ابدأ الآن، قلل من استهلاكك وساهم في حماية كوكبنا.

رقم التسجيل الضريبي: 319-897-204

From launching our first Carbon Footprint and Financed Emissions reports to opening our first LEED Gold certified branch, we continue to lead with purpose. Through initiatives like Sustainable Finance Champions and sourcing 94% of our energy from renewable sources, we’re accelerating the shift to a greener future and proudly supporting Egypt Vision 2030.

Act now, reduce consumption, and protect our planet.

On the occasion of Earth Hour, we believe that protecting our planet starts with each one of us. At Emirates NBD, sustainability is not just a commitment, but actions we take every day.

From launching our first carbon footprint and financed emissions reports to opening the first branch certified with LEED Gold, we continue to make progress with a clear goal. Through initiatives like Sustainable Finance Champions and our reliance on renewable energy to cover 94% of our consumption, we are accelerating the transition to a more sustainable future and supporting Egypt's Vision 2030.

Start now, reduce your consumption, and contribute to protecting our planet.

text: 彭博社消息，渣打银行计划将旗下 Zodia Custody 的客户端托管业务收回至其企业与投资银行（CIB）的数字资产部门，最快本月宣布。重组后，Zodia 将仅作为独立的托管技术软件即服务（SaaS）平台继续运营。
html: 渣打银行于 2020 年底通过创新部门 SC Ventures 与 Northern Trust 共同成立 Zodia Custody，后续吸引 SBI Holdings、澳大利亚国民银行与 Emirates NBD 等少数股权投资者，目前在全球七个办事处拥有约 150 名员工。

post: According to Bloomberg, Standard Chartered plans to bring the client custody business of its Zodia Custody back under its Corporate and Investment Banking (CIB) digital assets division, with an announcement expected as early as this month. After the restructuring, Zodia will continue to operate solely as an independent custody technology software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform.
